Authors and Citation

Citation

Source: DESCRIPTION

Anjos M (2026). LCZ4r: Tools for Local Climate Zones and Urban Heat Island Analysis. R package version 0.1.0, https://bymaxanjos.github.io/LCZ4r/. 

@Manual{,
  title = {LCZ4r: Tools for Local Climate Zones and Urban Heat Island Analysis},
  author = {Max Anjos},
  year = {2026},
  note = {R package version 0.1.0},
  url = {https://bymaxanjos.github.io/LCZ4r/},
